global.description: The ad features a bright green background with bold text and decorative shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute savings on special fares.

elements.label: Bright green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background fills the entire canvas, creating an energetic atmosphere.

elements.label: RouteBloon
elements.description: The text 'RouteBloon' is prominently displayed in bold, large font at the top center, conveying the brand name.

elements.label: Last-minute savings
elements.description: The phrase 'Last-minute savings' is presented in a slightly smaller, bold font, emphasizing urgency.

elements.label: Special fares today
elements.description: The text 'Special fares today' appears below the savings message in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small green circle is positioned at the top left, adding a decorative touch to the design.

elements.label: Medium circle
elements.description: A medium-sized green circle is located towards the bottom center, enhancing the visual interest.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A square shape is placed in the center, providing a contrasting element to the circular shapes.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Get offer' invites user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and playful, RouteBloon, last-minute savings, special fares.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top center, body text is in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Last-minute savings, Special fares today, RouteBloon, Get offer
